title: GenAI Jumpstart: Build Your First AI Agent
summary: Build your first working AI agent while understanding how prompts, tools, memory, and orchestration fit together inside a real GenAI system.
idealFor: Experienced developers new to GenAI systems
Professionals who want a guided first build
buildOutcome: A working AI agent that can reason through a task, use tools, and produce a useful result.
features: Understand the building blocks of a practical AI agent
Connect an LLM to tools and external functions
Build and run a guided agent workflow
See where memory, RAG, and multi-agent patterns fit
Leave with starter code and an extension roadmap
